title: Add ccp_hop_vectors() returning list of dicts with computed hash_output for sfn/seed cases
description: Implement ccp_hop_vectors() using the _hop_hash or existing hash_32(_h) helper. Cover SFN=0/1, different num_channels, rendezvous cases. Match expected_channel from current ccp16-hop.json but with real hash_output instead of placeholder strings. Follow test vector discipline: independent oracle only. Reference spec:120-125 and generate.py existing ccp16_vectors pattern.
